# Feature: CLI Runtime Scan

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-08 -->

## Intent
Wire the existing `@iamthamanic/autoguide-runtime` DOM scanner into `autoguide scan` so runtime facts with `runtime_dom` provenance are captured via Playwright (no manual Inspector), merged into the knowledge graph, and persisted to `.autoguide/`.

## Preconditions
- `autoguide.config.json` exists (`autoguide init`)
- For `--runtime`: app reachable at `baseUrl` (config or `--base-url` / `--runtime-url`)
- Playwright optional — runtime capture skips gracefully when unavailable

## Happy Path
- [x] `autoguide scan --runtime` captures DOM snapshots at configured `baseUrl`
- [x] Runtime facts use `runtime_dom` provenance via `runtimeSnapshotToFacts`
- [x] Facts appear in `.autoguide/facts.json` after merge
- [x] `runtime-snapshot.json` written when runtime scan runs
- [x] Routes scanned: source routes, else Playwright visited routes, else `/`

## Edge Cases
- [x] Without `--runtime`, scan behavior unchanged (no runtime facts)
- [x] Playwright missing → warning, scan continues with source/playwright import only
- [x] `safeMode` skips destructive route labels (same as crawl)
- [x] `--runtime-url` overrides base URL for runtime capture only
- [x] Unreachable runtime URL → warning, scan continues (partial state)

## Regression
- [x] `integrations/hr-workflows` scan test still passes without `--runtime`
- [x] Existing scanner/playwright/cli tests pass

## Assumptions
- Runtime capture uses Playwright headless + in-page scan (browser context); Node does not call `scanDom` directly
- Local dev: dev server at `baseUrl`; CI: start app or skip `--runtime`

## Implementation Notes
- `packages/playwright/src/browser-scan-dom.ts` — self-contained `browserScanDom` for `page.evaluate`
- `packages/playwright/src/capture-runtime.ts` — `captureRuntimeSnapshots`, `mergeRuntimeSnapshots`
- `packages/cli/src/commands/scan.ts` — `--runtime` / `--runtime-url`, merge via `mergeScanResults`, `runtime-snapshot.json`
- `packages/config` — `scan.runtime` opt-in default
- Tests: `merge-facts.test.ts`, `capture-runtime.test.ts`, `runtime-scan.integration.test.ts`
